content:
# Entity: Emily A. Watson

**Role:** Primary tortfeasor, mother of L.D.W.
**Legal Name:** Emily A. Watson (NOT Ann, NOT M., NOT Tiffany)
**Lanes:** A (Custody), D (PPO)
**Cases:** 2024-001507-DC, 2023-5907-PP
**Damages Range:** $125K–$750K
**Counts Against:** 13 tort counts (conspiracy, IIED, tortious interference, defamation, malicious prosecution, abuse of process, fraud on court, conversion, unjust enrichment, NIED, loss of companionship)
**Key Evidence:** 305 documented interference incidents, false CPS reports, ex parte applications, parenting time denial (569+ days)
**Discovery:** 25 interrogatories, 25 RFPs, 30 RFAs served
